llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Present pass_1 results as LOCAL_SNAPSHOT evidence and pass_2 results as LIVE_API evidence. Preserve scope distinction when comparing statuses, deployment times, and metadata between local and live states. Highlight any discrepancies in journey names, statuses, or timestamps between the two sources.

sql.query: SELECT NAME, STATUS, LASTDEPLOYEDTIME, UPDATEDTIME FROM dim_campaign LIMIT 100

passes.subtask: Retrieve local snapshot journey/campaign records with status and metadata

passes.expected_result: live API journey records with current status
passes.subtask: Retrieve live journey/campaign state from Journey Optimizer platform
